name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Ask Me ANYTHING...
body:
This Sunday is the LAST Sunday of 2025. A tradition at Sheridan.Church is the final Sunday of the year, I do a live Q&A; service where you can ask me
| | |
---
This Sunday is the _LAST_ Sunday of 2025. A tradition at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13882.1.7fb6b10ba40c487260386fa582c44bc4) is the final Sunday of the year, I do a **live Q &A** service where you can ask me anything. To ask a question you can **scan the QR code** above or text the word **questions** to **97000**. See you Sunday at 10am CT! -Wednesday, December 31 @6:30pm CT (ONLINE ONLY) - New Year's Eve Service Please consider giving to the mission of Sheridan: [https://sheridan.church/give/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13883.1.fb1fbb98e51446137c01d9914b6f04e3)
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13884.1.24dcfb0abc7ec75216d6041da3cc4d5d)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13885.1.e4329aad3fe61521a340ee6c21f884cf)
---
Last spring, I released my first book "[Chasing After The Wind](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13886.1.340b518d47ad31d76c4b71e4c0e408fb)" and so many of you encouraged me to keep writing. _So I did..._ My 2nd book is now **FINISHED**! It's entitled '[DIVIDED: BREAKING FREE FROM THE DOUBLE LIFE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13887.1.d4ea22edacfac4462a5a2322dc741026).' **Pastor Paula White-Cain** wrote an _incredible_ Foreword and **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** gave an _amazing_ Endorsement. In this, I open up about _my own personal struggles_ as a follower of Jesus and a Pastor. I share things that I've never shared publicly in hopes that it will speak to people who might be ashamed with the different struggles they have even as Christians and how to have victory. There are two of us in all of us but we're not destined to live **DIVIDED** forever. As a thank you for your support, I've got a promo code (**SHERIDAN**) that you can use to save 30% off the pre-order at checkout. You can visit: [https://clr.cm/qPKQ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13888.1.a79517bf108d5b382f4258f97978fda2)to get your SIGNED copy and start reading immediately with the **FREE e-book** that's included. I believe this book will help many people overcome the double life that far too many of us live. Thank you -Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Click Here To Read "DIVIDED" Now ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13889.1.6003836c12e35963c45f6bb5e060fcfe)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13890.1.c2a69cd6785bf2d9d7df53db0dd87ff5)
---
Every one of us lives with tension - the tug-of-war between the two of us living in all of us. In DIVIDED, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer gets real, raw, and deeply relatable as he opens up about his own struggles with pride, anger, and failure while chasing God's purpose. Through humor, honesty, and hard-learned wisdom, Lahmeyer invites readers to drop the mask, confront the "dark me" that keeps surfacing, and experience the transforming power of grace. This is not a polished preacher's pep talk-it's a gut-level, heart-to-heart conversation about what it means to follow Jesus when life gets messy. Drawing from the lives of biblical characters like Peter, Jacob and Paul, Lahmeyer shows that even the greatest heroes of faith had moments of weakness, doubt, and defeat. He unpacks the difference between remorse and repentance, explores how belief shapes behavior, and reveals how identity-not effort-is the key to lasting transformation. With vivid stories, relatable honesty, and the truth of Scripture, he reminds us that God isn't looking for the perfect version of you-He's after the real you. Because the moment you get real with God is the moment He starts making you new. If you've ever felt like you're living two lives-the public you that looks strong and the private you that's barely hanging on-this book is for you. DIVIDED will help you see that failure isn't final, temptation isn't sin, and your past doesn't disqualify your purpose. You'll laugh, you'll be challenged, and you'll find hope in the God who meets you where you are but never leaves you there. Honest, gritty, and full of grace, this book will inspire you to feed the right wolf, renew your mind, and finally live as the "you" God designed you to be.
---
---
|
---
Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13891.1.3ae825588a56aadb5ff0647986f0561f) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13892.1.c6d3f13b9a49aa4a76fe9a3819e30e29)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13893.1.880bc65c2e202885ba8eeee723b349cb)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13894.1.164ff676446865934f3bf2f3dcc3b0fb). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13895.1.88229c393a3be2e3c607a30377de517e) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13896.1.80798807b1feadd8ce8f43c46e8bc715) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13897.1.e4bc121bab8b5e9524c9c612853f4831) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13898.1.e86e6310574c61de118d60750ed4461b)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13899.1.e110cb75f3d3d392af294427ebcd5eab) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13900.1.add78bc79cd188dad3f15ec3ce98f1be) Thank you,
---
| | [ Read: Chasing After The Wind ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13901.1.f15a21b096821f3f1818c888f3bde88e)
---
---
---
©2025 Jackson Lahmeyer | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
---
| [Web Version](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13902.1.2e0ecf2f7afd9cae6dcd75ff2da87625&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODk3NjUzOTctMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtN2VlODUyOWJlNTJhZmE2MjBiYTE0NDkyMTY2NjZlNTRkNDNiN2E3YSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMjcwNjcyMTkifQ== "Web Version") [Preferences](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13903.1.1e7d44f32d57cfbb1ffc6e44466a0c02&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODk3NjUzOTctMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtN2VlODUyOWJlNTJhZmE2MjBiYTE0NDkyMTY2NjZlNTRkNDNiN2E3YSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMjcwNjcyMTkifQ== "Preferences") [Forward](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=27067219.13904.1.b28eac19bc62a8941f1b2263b22ca889&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODk3NjUzOTctMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtN2VlODUyOWJlNTJhZmE2MjBiYTE0NDkyMTY2NjZlNTRkNDNiN2E3YSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMjcwNjcyMTkifQ== "Forward") [Unsubscribe](https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=27067219-189765397-13583593210-7ee8529be52afa620ba1449216666e54d43b7a7a "Unsubscribe")

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: This would mean a complete dismantling of the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@ariberman.bsky.social: SCOTUS decision killing what’s left of Voting Rights Act could cost Dems 19 House seats, eliminate every majority-minority district in South, eviscerate 14th/15th Amendments & fulfill John Roberts 40-year crusade against country’s most important civil rights law [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122625_2&amount=25]
The impact shows how partisan this all is, Team. A complete dismantling of the Voting Rights Act -- a key civil rights law -- would only harm one political party and return parts of the country to a suppressive era we left behind sixty years ago.
During the oral arguments in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122625_2&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122625_2&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122625_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122625_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122625_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=7hakrH9zYSXCgdSgjuwC4kdM%2BSoTFQDci77UnGn64yyto2spHKlUnZA4HkFflt4pczF0a%2F3XJbmI72653dLGyqYkEuPJjFTBhv39xkenZzTX%2BywGK9Ylur0wfpTO1MHby591WjO5AzIe9UnOMvxSIg5oM0KeOvzwVb8QTVinmk4i%2B0hxuqIK6g809jvyBL1r0MzzJ75vWKhJ7mH8xTCu5kt5WE3rt3eHHcSjR5hmoAfsdS7begvXpdisUNXR3W3UuJs3%2FhxBtnTW6s8iu0F8X2lPOPzOT%2FZX5aqoI0PG0WQ1tkh2zChs8%2F21cfiErV3UibAGpRoTFexrxu5b5QxCswKLAZ9hU9PtaQ5uiEGJ3b4lQSDpl6JrlvpeKIhHdohM2Y8xHtb4AUywxq9etJWuR35uHHACzO7NxOIAUJNyYo4%3D .

Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [] GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end. We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding. Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity. We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

Now we have to show — on the public record — that California Democrats are ready for the next phase in protecting democracy: Flipping the U.S. House. = = = = = = \- CADEM HQ | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. Peter, it’s crunch time — **our last public filing deadline of 2025 is at midnight on the 31st!**

As we gear up for our election year, it’s clear we’ll need to invest early and often to make our push for Congress. As your representative, I’ll make sure Philly has a seat at the table.
* When gun violence was tearing through North and West Philly, **I secured millions in funding for grassroots organizations** — mentoring young people, preventing violence, and creating safe opportunities in our neighborhoods.
* When families struggled to afford healthcare, **I helped implement Pennsylvania’s Obamacare exchange** , enabling thousands to get covered and lower their costs.
* And when Donald Trump tried to throw out Pennsylvanians’ votes in 2020, **I took him to court — and won.**

That’s the kind of leadership I’ll bring to Congress. **But first, we need to finish this year strong.

[Our end-of-year deadline is fast approaching, and my team has set a goal of raising $25,000 by midnight on the 31st. Can you chip in today to help us start 2026 strong? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122022521/591330984/-406127211?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SFU_20251226_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_sharifstreet_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTFkZmFmNS04ZWUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VSFe-hLEcxs4M6gSgeqDlDB9v309GuvI1kWQNQrrCc=)**

body:
3 simple goals that we can achieve, together. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122022803/591331904/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjA1ZmY3Mi05MWUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuhSv7tltL9FPh1XtzmB1K00jsMiveXsQA7yMFqxrAc=&emci=17ea6602-d8d9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=d605ff72-91e2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

I know everyone always says this, but there's something magical about the holiday season. There's time spent with family and friends, love and joy spread through acts of gift-giving, and a renewed sense of hope for what's to come. For me, it's the coming of the new year that brings the most excitement.

The new year is always filled with hope—about what's to come and of what we can achieve. That's why I want to share with you my New Year's Resolutions for 2026:

☑️ Keep Washington's 8th District blue.
☑️ Flip the House for Democrats.
☑️ Put the priorities and needs of the American people first again.

Like any New Year's Resolutions, these can only happen through hard work and dedication. And like many other resolutions (going to the gym more?), we can't put all our effort into this goal in just the first week of the new year and then let our resolve die down. We have to keep going, all the way till the end.

clean_body: 3 simple goals that we can achieve, together. Peter, I know everyone always says this, but there's something magical about the holiday season. There's time spent with family and friends, love and joy spread through acts of gift-giving, and a renewed sense of hope for what's to come. For me, it's the coming of the new year that brings the most excitement. The new year is always filled with hope—about what's to come and of what we can achieve. That's why I want to share with you my New Year's Resolutions for 2026: ☑️ Keep Washington's 8th District blue. ☑️ Flip the House for Democrats. ☑️ Put the priorities and needs of the American people first again. Like any New Year's Resolutions, these can only happen through hard work and dedication. And like many other resolutions (going to the gym more?), we can't put all our effort into this goal in just the first week of the new year and then let our resolve die down. We have to keep going, all the way till the end. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for helping make my New Year's Resolutions come true, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. body:
As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including: | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3e260a71eda040008b8f340c3aff3767&_e=yFxAFdKyCDa-ABs7CvOOutAWfkDAcK4iW-1MXpDJ5f4x71LB9xiQ-iSkafTWfWEuBt6_JtG6jqntSqVd0bX_0JTvhlckM-4cB639aUQ8fPt5WmX677_r-R-VX4a6RjnFoyLW50A2u9lrYrBnjhaCegEpgzra3Mnq0uH_qy_3oWmaYupc_3yva-a9QdRMN5pE9HezAO2OWEdHbgRWYZTjtHAb74DnFEAyznSmkUzBTWGYpnqb7gQsl6QCbL9i6JL6b7PpZDvfi1G9KLtf2f_GeMI3Ml9em3UOnlE07y2BAc4ITVY69YAPYLEeZyfnYGRsAle5XfUyWDsLl-wkDoLo6D4jRRt2QWwBo6qlKs4u_mcmiDdusSI5bibPQvM8q6OMzRB7j-Xs0_Q72BHyG3EcXN9mkMNwXaxkFylyBZgk1_rBXOIrIUDmrhbERU4UgASBoLEqDBI4oU880ElNOiEoCJTp4PlzM_vVnauwP7AbznzQPmzLtZVvse1dHUuT2BmW5r0SSjXr4Hzqxs_IWyv5htOBZLF08IbaV0NGWLUNWgqHYTmJXuRd05mDFFxFgcds4HknFxeAd7ldtSgq1GzIsARDXXEN1Wow6p5QnXAFvW4SrBOctlRXEhNJEvXL4YFGhtoDvkt9me_NPeSiH2KP-yrYP_YjPcwZOuFv-jXUXnWAekf8gb0184vty5Ksm0nqijaU4_qLbfFhdXK7a4SZu38_CTPHEdZnuB1It6QgDi-CyqxmThXErNcpqm8pR1nNafB3hsVYzDHRb_y_YvJgIg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota.

**I’m a former Navy SEAL who doesn’t beat around the bush.** I’ve put myself in harm's way more times than I can count because I love what this country stands for.

Leadership doesn’t start on the day one is elected; it’s a quality that one learns from a young age - you exercise it, and it develops over time. President Trump personifies it - so does Marco Rubio.

**But Tim Walz?** He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone.

That isn’t leadership, it’s cowardice.

**As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including:**

* **$300m** to pay for the therapy of children with autism, who, in fact, didn’t have autism.

* **$250m** stolen from funds meant to feed hungry children.

So far, Governor Walz has taken ZERO accountability and **[I’m calling on him to RESIGN.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3e260a71eda040008b8f340c3aff3767&_e=yFxAFdKyCDa-ABs7CvOOutAWfkDAcK4iW-1MXpDJ5f4x71LB9xiQ-iSkafTWfWEuBt6_JtG6jqntSqVd0bX_0JTvhlckM-4cB639aUQ8fPt5WmX677_r-R-VX4a6RjnFoyLW50A2u9lrYrBnjhaCegEpgzra3Mnq0uH_qy_3oWmaYupc_3yva-a9QdRMN5pE9HezAO2OWEdHbgRWYZTjtHAb74DnFEAyznSmkUzBTWGYpnqb7gQsl6QCbL9i6JL6b7PpZDvfi1G9KLtf2f_GeIhMpCrPnG_Lsx66EZiBchgH53spJqbg0KmHSSxycKHUv3qNuviJnZt4LUdtOOtgJmB3oIHkQGldW3DtAzI2ZXRuKMXZNgKMGPNEsVa5v2QYUBgViUIuQtOUsyZv1D8mqz2CGb4qMVlkSJW_hPWnUKk7sb-4hREdLbjgOMWXrlfordPNliw_WkQws7Trjzecgbpfq2oulRr6Ec6LtWQir7EOjWvYuD_K6T0jcBcyPEb1hC-aTVecmNYFTERkeRRuWFt7j9iFo-hcYIxQz-xVOeC1xTzGk3EVIbtc6Nh2C2EypNgtH-R7o0-Kkm0I7wNNrGE-khfGNSmn9YGFI5FoUQSnXR0qV285TIqO-o7UgHLzqrLUj11LyvFgjCLunY0mdSP2rLfrwd440L-f99iFxc8pAVkj4qvGyNmsoUWciVkKOdYCXtdWpRFLe0W66f9HQPE83tq3CKddX12rYqkGTtyQA6Ue9q-sVukrd_6-gTqhwGSY5JuXG8LSHHmGCrpHmg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including: | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota. I’m a former Navy SEAL who doesn’t beat around the bush. I’ve put myself in harm's way more times than I can count because I love what this country stands for. Leadership doesn’t start on the day one is elected; it’s a quality that one learns from a young age - you exercise it, and it develops over time. President Trump personifies it - so does Marco Rubio. But Tim Walz? He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone. That isn’t leadership, it’s cowardice. As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including: $300m to pay for the therapy of children with autism, who, in fact, didn’t have autism. $250m stolen from funds meant to feed hungry children. So far, Governor Walz has taken ZERO accountability and In service, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
A call for Republicans to think about their New Year’s resolutions more deeply this year.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122023158/591332592/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmQ3YjZjNS05MmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyyYVXs3bOn0Fm9ptL45j6mFiPsqqbOBecbuGZI6C3U=) It's Andrea Salinas. As we approach the new year, I’ve been spending a lot of time thinking about this past year and coming up with New Year’s resolutions on what I can do better in 2026. I think now would also be a great time for Republicans to reflect on the major “achievements” of their trifecta in 2025. Prices skyrocketing. Soldiers in the streets. Healthcare cuts for millions of Americans. The longest government shutdown in American HISTORY. Is this what they think America voted for? And, unfortunately, _**there is no evidence that this will end in 2026.**_ My New Year's resolution is simple: I can’t turn back the clock on the harm Republicans have caused, but I can promise to fight harder than ever for a better future next year — that fight starts with flipping the House blue. [_**Democratic House majority could be our ONLY line of defense against Trump and his band of MAGA loyalists in Washington next year — which makes defending our seat even more important. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Why December 31 matters so much
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
2026 is days away.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251226-1&t=1&akid=2982%2E587540%2EgSRKTQ)
Peter,
2026 is _days away_ , and Leaders We Deserve is heading into this critical midterm year with a growing slate of young progressive candidates who are ready to fight for real change.
**That’s why December 31 matters so much.** How much we raise by the end of the year will determine how much early support we can provide to our candidates as the 2026 cycle ramps up.
That’s why we set a goal to bring in 250,000 individual contributions before the end of the year, and every donation helps us elect the leaders we deserve next November. Our records show that you haven’t made a donation this year. [**Will you step up today by making your first donation of $20.26 or any amount to help us reach our goal?**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3950?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251226_1_recap.eV6diw&%3Brefcode=em20251226-2982&t=3&akid=2982%2E587540%2EgSRKTQ)
**[Donate $20.26 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3950?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251226_1_recap.eV6diw&refcode=em20251226-2982&t=4&akid=2982%2E587540%2EgSRKTQ)**
Here’s who we’ve endorsed so far:
* **Laalitya Acharya** is an engineer, a public school grad, and an activist. She’s running for Ohio’s 56th House District to fight for the same schools and communities that raised her.

* **Nida Allam** is challenging an ineffective Democratic incumbent in North Carolina’s 4th District because her district needs someone fighting for them. Nida has a strong record supporting education and raising workers’ wages.

* **Kristian Carranza** grew up on the Southside of San Antonio, raised by a single mom. Her family lived paycheck to paycheck, relied on school meals, and depended on Pell Grants to access higher education — giving Kristian firsthand insight into affordability challenges for working families.

* **Justin J. Pearson** is a member of the “Tennessee Three.” He organized to beat two billion-dollar oil companies to protect Memphis’ water and consistently protected his community from corporate greed. Now he’s running to defeat asleep-at-the-wheel Democratic Rep. Steve Cohen.

* **Donavan McKinney** is a State Representative who, in office, has delivered more than $10 million in community violence intervention programs, millions for public schools and community rec centers, and $600 million to replace lead pipes. He’s a fighter for Detroit, who’s taking on ineffective Democratic incumbent Rep. Shri Thanedar in Michigan’s 13th Congressional District.

* **Demi Palecek** is a military veteran, a survivor, and a community organizer. She’s fought for our democracy in uniform — literally standing guard at the Capitol after January 6. When Donald Trump sent troops to Chicago, Demi made headlines as a member of the National Guard who publicly said she’d refuse to follow illegal orders.

* **Robert Peters** has delivered real wins for working people in Illinois — from community violence prevention and overhauling how we respond to mental health crises to helping workers retire with dignity and improving services for children and families. Now, he’s running for Congress to represent Illinois’ 2nd District.

* **Graham Platner** is a Marine and U.S. Army veteran, oyster farmer, and Chair of the Sullivan Planning Board who’s running to defeat Republican U.S. Senator Susan Collins and win back this seat for working Mainers.

* **Matt Post** knows that Maryland can have the best public schools, safest communities, strongest workers’ rights, most abundant affordable housing, healthiest environment, and more if the people are willing to fight for that future.

* **Nabeela Syed** is running for Illinois State Senate in the 26th District to continue the work she started as a State Representative: lowering costs for working families, protecting access to healthcare, making voting more accessible for young people, and strengthening public schools.

* **Lauren Babb Tomlinson** has been on the frontlines of the tough fights to defend abortion rights, expand access to affordable healthcare, and protect workers’ rights. Now she is running for Congress in California’s 6th District.

* **Randy Villegas** is an educator, an auto repair shop owner, and a proud son of Mexican immigrants. He is running for Congress to serve his home, California’s Central Valley.

Reaching our year-end goal is how Leaders We Deserve can help these campaigns hire staff, build field programs, and compete in a system that’s stacked against them.
**[If you’re able, please chip in before December 31 to help us start 2026 strong.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251226_1_recap.iLGCTS&refcode=em20251226-2982&amount=5&t=5&akid=2982%2E587540%2EgSRKTQ)**
**[Donate $20.26 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3950?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251226_1_recap.eV6diw&refcode=em20251226-2982&t=24&akid=2982%2E587540%2EgSRKTQ)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251226-1&t=25&refcode2=2982_587540_gSRKTQ&akid=2982%2E587540%2EgSRKTQ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2982%2E587540%2EgSRKTQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2982%2E587540%2EgSRKTQ)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX) Listen, this is your final notice.

We’ve reached out to you over and over again. It’s probably time to give up, but we had to try and reach you one more time.

All we’re asking for is your signature on our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to [**END _Citizens United_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=3&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX) before the Supreme Court ruins all of our progress... but you don’t seem to care?!

We thought after we told you how IMPORTANT this was, you would listen — but [**STILL, NOTHING.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=4&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX)

[**The deadline for our petition is TONIGHT at 11:59PM**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=5&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX) [**and you are the only Democrat in your area who hasn't responded.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=6&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX)

[ **Will you PLEASE add your name to our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to end _Citizens United?_ >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=7&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX) | [SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=8&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX)

Fight for Reform

[**“Supreme Court agrees to hear Republican-backed effort to lift caps on campaign spending”**

_CNN_ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=10&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=11&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX)
---|---

[SIGN NOW TO HELP OUR EFFORTS TO END _CITIZENS UNITED_ →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=12&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX)
---
Friend – this could change everything in a TERRIBLE WAY.

This case (backed by Vice President J.D. Vance) would allow BILLIONAIRE DONORS to drop TENS of thousands of dollars into party committees without any caps.

The Supreme Court has already ruled in FAVOR of _Citizens United_ and money in politics. So it’s never been so CRUCIAL that we show WIDESPREAD SUPPORT for getting money OUT of politics once and for all.

That’s why Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm:
[]()
[**So please Friend, before it’s too late: Sign our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to END _Citizens United_ and stop billionaire donors from rigging our elections →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=13&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71062?t=14&akid=23744%2E4449941%2E1USZsX)
---
Thanks,

_Fight for Reform_

name: To catch a predator
subject: Trump admits to being a sleazebag
body:
In an unhinged, all caps rant, Trump wished a Merry Christmas to the “many sleazebags who loved Jeffrey Epstein.”
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i8i48EJFyyhQiyXKoLYAwRtG45J3q03WQ62Weg7nItOAZG3o1kpAlVlzcnB-wcEzoQY5hOgarEN7uGyfOsSrFzAyVn7KTrutmMxws4A-VnRH2WXIu-qCrJ0ANtO97rr9kaC3QL6mfJJ5FrFLWT5fS0wO01mxF63kePiVlYCAj7lumkpN2yslUNMIs4pY0ufPJJRynOlKXCNnbx2GThZ2hlPhB5kN3FLl&c=U776-HPfh5dGixmG7n1y5ijGO6SZQ75e4OsCyCjkhPjlKzW7leslhA==&ch=cEqhSsdEPT3rsVtdd6P-kNPZ_AXmZjV5FTVnokUwJ3G36Hy-Q4Pp4Q==)
---
|
Peter,
While most of us were spending Christmas with our families, Donald Trump was busy on Truth Social, delivering what can only be described as an overt self-own.
In an unhinged, all caps rant, Trump wished a Merry Christmas to the "many sleazebags who loved Jeffrey Epstein."
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i8i48EJFyyhQiyXKoLYAwRtG45J3q03WQ62Weg7nItOAZG3o1kpAlVlzcnB-wcEzoQY5hOgarEN7uGyfOsSrFzAyVn7KTrutmMxws4A-VnRH2WXIu-qCrJ0ANtO97rr9kaC3QL6mfJJ5FrFLWT5fS0wO01mxF63kePiVlYCAj7lumkpN2yslUNMIs4pY0ufPJJRynOlKXCNnbx2GThZ2hlFy_KmSAy2N&c=U776-HPfh5dGixmG7n1y5ijGO6SZQ75e4OsCyCjkhPjlKzW7leslhA==&ch=cEqhSsdEPT3rsVtdd6P-kNPZ_AXmZjV5FTVnokUwJ3G36Hy-Q4Pp4Q==)
---
|
He's describing himself. As more information trickles out from the Epstein files, his name keeps popping up over and over again. Epstein was a regular at Trump's Mar-a-Lago, Trump has been videotaped partying with Epstein, has called Epstein a "terrific guy" in the past, and it's now been revealed that he flew on Epstein's plane more times than previously thought and with victims of Epstein's abuse on board.

---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i8i48EJFyyhQiyXKoLYAwRtG45J3q03WQ62Weg7nItOAZG3o1kpAlVlzcnB-wcEzoQY5hOgarEN7uGyfOsSrFzAyVn7KTrutmMxws4A-VnRH2WXIu-qCrJ0ANtO97rr9kaC3QL6mfJJ5FrFLWT5fS0wO01mxF63kePiVlYCAj7lumkpN2yslUNMIs4pY0ufPJJRynOlKXCNnbx2GThZ2hmmsRi7dGQNR&c=U776-HPfh5dGixmG7n1y5ijGO6SZQ75e4OsCyCjkhPjlKzW7leslhA==&ch=cEqhSsdEPT3rsVtdd6P-kNPZ_AXmZjV5FTVnokUwJ3G36Hy-Q4Pp4Q==)
---

This is a calculated, desperate attempt to project his own documented ties onto others before the full truth comes out.
We cannot allow the DOJ to continue this cover-up. We deserve to know why a billionaire predator with ties to the White House was allowed to evade justice. We deserve to know why the files are still redacted.
Democrat Bushra Amiwala is running for Congress because she's tired of the "politics of protection" for the ultra-wealthy and the well-connected. Bushra believes in transparency, in accountability, and in a government that actually works for us--not one that spends its time covering for predators.
[Trump is terrified of the truth. Let's make sure he can't hide from it any longer. Will you make a contribution of $25, $15, or whatever you can spare so Bushra can take this fight to D.C. and finally bring justice?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i8i48EJFyyhQiyXKoLYAwRtG45J3q03WQ62Weg7nItOAZG3o1kpAlVlzcnB-wcEzz2nkd8_HX2C0w7qnRaWkDm5wFLqXA5B-68rxzwDMxfdvNKDlHpU1DZFGXPgD5jM28kwLAXCYaFfq-po25JeUr6uy2yYKjzaWYS29D2g3jHfpM1f9dHCXDh4j_fZCmgFKIuHJM4jST-U2uOtfEkDapCKNWUfgZsyiBB3zzjEYm8GYozTdj5fhAw==&c=U776-HPfh5dGixmG7n1y5ijGO6SZQ75e4OsCyCjkhPjlKzW7leslhA==&ch=cEqhSsdEPT3rsVtdd6P-kNPZ_AXmZjV5FTVnokUwJ3G36Hy-Q4Pp4Q==)

clean_body: In an unhinged, all caps rant, Trump wished a Merry Christmas to the “many sleazebags who loved Jeffrey Epstein.” | | | | | == | Peter, While most of us were spending Christmas with our families, Donald Trump was busy on Truth Social, delivering what can only be described as an overt self-own. In an unhinged, all caps rant, Trump wished a Merry Christmas to the "many sleazebags who loved Jeffrey Epstein." | | == | He's describing himself. As more information trickles out from the Epstein files, his name keeps popping up over and over again. Epstein was a regular at Trump's Mar-a-Lago, Trump has been videotaped partying with Epstein, has called Epstein a "terrific guy" in the past, and it's now been revealed that he flew on Epstein's plane more times than previously thought and with victims of Epstein's abuse on board. | == This is a calculated, desperate attempt to project his own documented ties onto others before the full truth comes out. We cannot allow the DOJ to continue this cover-up. We deserve to know why a billionaire predator with ties to the White House was allowed to evade justice. We deserve to know why the files are still redacted. Democrat Bushra Amiwala is running for Congress because she's tired of the "politics of protection" for the ultra-wealthy and the well-connected. Bushra believes in transparency, in accountability, and in a government that actually works for us--not one that spends its time covering for predators. == | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | In solidarity, Team Bushra | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Reader,I'm pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column. In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country - **and there are many.** Our nation has lost its way. Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead.
---
| | [ JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ → ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=73bd86b086e041f4a0e27b39a71e6161&_e=Aw8pHdwQc3bYV2gfifA5kNWM7DWwyrk2ucelXHGi9s9F3RAHvGbdiR4i3RTHVcfbUqChO1pr5x2yEZriK2XAvTIF0usnJcCS7unHQlujjTGOz7_yeka2qhJ87lt6pfmUvAPFvaPaI59aP5YrUZHBVjH0MgJZ7ygNRAeDrdeoC3hHkOmmdyI0_k85W3i24ruuXNqfL29D4xFtvC-2auzKPbhsb_S510fImTucy1atwQEwIMZtFwOLbPBxfSVILWqDuPBOYCfORNNXv0eTp7_5UNDH67JR-vMn8jggwubjvL1Ev0tnDt5X76LVPuT_6eJAGdQqSeOyEhmGXR3fUvDCVJcWixx8Es6PlObIraDOWFc1zrhkv7KGt9TC7bqKsV1NiNEQkJ70q5IHzNOBmTdA6kTVcjsGQNUiQXLOhvM7Io1ndaQemmghDNzZN807FQMKbw72VX-n8A6shyyo89V289gtKPRr93R_xWO4qNJT6-rs-PtIzi8f7XYuhX_hx1uSsqXRc4_ZLHxc-5RDMnZyKvEGpZLS1DTpMMAKb7srAffOlAxg4IKtNkrmWPiGZzqEl81zr_0gvAhPrziKNClVfg%3D%3D)

| | But it's the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I've never seen it so bad. For this reason, **I 've chosen The New York Sun as a partner.**It's a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years. It's a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values. It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.It remains our nation's most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of "paper of record" but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens. Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.**To win, we need you to join us.** To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America. Membership starts at just 1 cent per day.

Fellow American,

**[43 days.](http://links.gopnrsc.com/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=149b1d18347b469f85c822db10545673&_e=9w6twa1itzK5j8KLXGgsnkVhGYw2Q-In0c1Yj6tvLxSj5TQ4iAm-lT07eNGE1kFXtzFVEk9G45sb-SKDquGK7Do0wRvuCPSIBHBnwzUr0f1NSX-E1s64gzAXpw7hh5rEg6g2BswhY0JieXGLDscLCK6P5R5Ak0AESht5jlJ8hYK0eZvtzUjk1wLT7swkORvR9tF2BYvI5G7SCUQMYPi1SbWg_XOuATSM94bP28hlzSRLZfAp_FEVcLkPHCnbFWmp8lGs5eid8DlLkaAVwOw57a8GTebrF2ctpj1tc9xOfl9zd7sFzCr3GZzH7dTkhV91O8rQSdaHSqmquH15KQ0Uc_yykBSbPQiacFa7UqhDKOkEzYZmTcyD6HhKMkzPfaOiXRuDxFtM-jel4sShyLhGF8wlAKMdR2OHF3f3EglSFcn7y7agYh_ihHPdxS2R5I-jlX3JEwqhUvFnpk20-BqPhLFm_jsfhgozDWuHZnNV82sKoNe88G4lA7OFHrz02LsmhbilGpg00dxv2PwYbVnvflmW25lXyyrBto4udjiOq7MG7zMwZNdXUf5gyODWkhwnG9_e24DU1HLEt4Vqc9mL8XUAe_6ot5zF-_F2SeOG29ffrbtYufKvp8RkuJmQDRjJUK0JEo5cOYEsAu98thxnQFGwA8RuQf_4uFG898iBid_ds3xI_Roz98-GCiQpItmQPBU8fFgHdD4s5dkxmuvLgxE0wQRfgNWW-nMcgpHruwcwwFV_VL6C58omsliqqBBwTsIO9ASYVIc8jhbXEPff5El-UsI_XBOP29ab7VISxwfyDjlvvAkH2w4x8SxHM3a9PxSH-ON1vQ2w1MgUj4ZRvIONHHUdVDstFStN0ORlmjc%3D)**

That's how long Chuck Schumer and the radical Democrats held our government hostage to try and force _you_ to pay for free benefits for _illegal aliens_.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Radical Left Lunatic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Here’s what he said:
| | |
---
Friend, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day.
_And two weeks ago, he directed one at me._
Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is terrified that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people.
Friend, I’m not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too.
**_[I need your help to face what’s ahead. I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and Michael Bennet of whatever you can afford so we can have the resources to fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122024272/591336858/1975801904?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1031-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjA3YzgzMC05NmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ar6Tf6-xrD-T_-jnU1ZnhQ1AZcqMkS64zqE9zKBDnHU=)_**
So, you may be wondering what exactly Trump said about me.
He called me a _“radical left lunatic.”_
**If fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, good schools, and a livable planet makes me a “radical left lunatic,” then so be it.**
You know where I stand and what I’m fighting for, friend. I need to know if you’re with me.
**_[I’m not asking because I want to, but because I have to. This is the most consequential Senate race on the map. Split a donation between our campaign and Michael Bennet if you can, and help me take on Trump and the national GOP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122024273/591336859/1975801904?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1031-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjA3YzgzMC05NmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ar6Tf6-xrD-T_-jnU1ZnhQ1AZcqMkS64zqE9zKBDnHU=)_**

name: Liz Porter
subject: My daughter Katie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
My daughter is running for governor of California because she feels called to take on the struggles so many families like her own face.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40617%2E3422442%2E4bUowT)
Dear Peter,
This is Liz Porter, Katie’s mom.
Today, I want to share a little about raising Katie and falling in love with quilting. **[But first, can you chip in $5 to my daughter’s campaign for governor today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251226_1_ak.UJSRv6&refcode=em20251226-40617&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40617%2E3422442%2E4bUowT)**
When I was raising Katie and her siblings, like any family with young kids, nothing I did stayed done. Cooking didn’t stay done. Changing diapers didn’t stay done. Picking up toys definitely didn’t stay done.
But when I sewed two pieces of fabric together, they _stayed_ together. That’s how I fell in love with quilting.
I took that passion for keeping things together and built a quilting small business that eventually meant people recognized me in public—much to the annoyance of my kids. When I see Katie stopped in public (much to the annoyance of her kids), it makes me proud. She’s channeled her passions into building lasting change for everyday Californians.
I like quilting for the same reasons Katie found her home in consumer law and public service: when life feels overwhelming, focus your energy on the things where you can truly make a difference.
My daughter is running for governor of California because she feels called to take on the struggles so many families like her own face, like rising costs and an out-of-control president. She’s running to be a champion for hardworking Californians.
**[I know my daughter will do what’s right for California, just like I’ve watched her stand up for working people her whole life. I hope you’ll join me in supporting her campaign by chipping in $5 today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251226_1_ak.UJSRv6&refcode=em20251226-40617&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40617%2E3422442%2E4bUowT)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251226_1_ak.UJSRv6&refcode=em20251226-40617&t=23&akid=40617%2E3422442%2E4bUowT)
Thank you,
Liz Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251226-40617&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40617_3422442_4bUowT&akid=40617%2E3422442%2E4bUowT)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40617&t=25&akid=40617%2E3422442%2E4bUowT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40617)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40617&t=26&akid=40617%2E3422442%2E4bUowT)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: James Carville
subject: It's time to get serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss the Senate majority goodbye.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥 Before you read another word, chip in $10 or whatever you can to help Chris Pappas fight back right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251226_2.DcoTzw&refcode=em20251226-2&t=1&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the right-wing’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Rush a contribution to Chris Pappas today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251226_2.DcoTzw&refcode=em20251226-2&t=2&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)**
**[Chip in Now »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251226_2.vj59Ya&refcode=em20251226-2&t=3&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251226_2.DcoTzw&refcode=em20251226-2&t=4&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251226_2.DcoTzw&refcode=em20251226-2&t=5&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251226-2&t=6&refcode2=4121_582294_G_2YzG&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=7&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=8&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=4121%2E582294%2EG_2YzG)

Manchester, NH 03105

Dear Friends,

For many Oregon families, the rising cost of living has made every dollar matter.

That’s why the successful effort to gather signatures to repeal the Oregon gas tax was so important. In communities across all 36 Oregon counties, committed volunteers and supporters came together, sacrificing time and resources to protect family budgets and small businesses, and to deliver a powerful message to Salem — that government should respect the people it serves.

That effort sent a clear signal: when citizens unite around common-sense solutions, we can push back against policies that strain household budgets and hurt our communities.

As we prepare for the year ahead, your support allows us to continue advocating for policies that put families first and hold leaders accountable.

If you are considering a year-end gift, please remember the $50 Oregon Political Tax Credit for qualifying taxpayers. A contribution of up to $50 per individual or $100 per married couple may be fully credited back on your Oregon taxes, making your support both meaningful and practical.

Your generosity helps ensure we can build on recent successes and continue fighting for a more balanced and responsible Oregon.

Thank you for your trust, your commitment, and your continued support.

God bless,

Connie Whelchel
Chair, Oregon Republican Party

clean_body: | | | | Your gift may qualify for Oregon’s $50 political tax credit. Dear Friends, For many Oregon families, the rising cost of living has made every dollar matter. That’s why the successful effort to gather signatures to repeal the Oregon gas tax was so important. In communities across all 36 Oregon counties, committed volunteers and supporters came together, sacrificing time and resources to protect family budgets and small businesses, and to deliver a powerful message to Salem — that government should respect the people it serves. That effort sent a clear signal: when citizens unite around common-sense solutions, we can push back against policies that strain household budgets and hurt our communities. As we prepare for the year ahead, your support allows us to continue advocating for policies that put families first and hold leaders accountable. If you are considering a year-end gift, please remember the $50 Oregon Political Tax Credit for qualifying taxpayers. A contribution of up to $50 per individual or $100 per married couple may be fully credited back on your Oregon taxes, making your support both meaningful and practical. Your generosity helps ensure we can build on recent successes and continue fighting for a more balanced and responsible Oregon. Thank you for your trust, your commitment, and your continued support. Hi there, While Trump and MAGA Republicans attack everything from voting rights to abortion access to basic economic fairness, young Democrats at the University of Arizona are fighting back — and they're not backing down. The University of Arizona College Democrats are building partnerships between students, elected representatives, and local, state, and national Democratic parties to elect Democrats and advance progressive policy. They're organizing on campus, registering first-time voters, and ensuring that student voices are heard in the decisions that shape their futures. **[Could you split a donation to help us keep fighting for Arizona’s future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122024510/591337446/-1148394427?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251226_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThjYWJkNGItOTdlMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ARciMvAE03H8aAJUm-p2ikCTtqSXq2Qvx747iGE22XY=)** | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122024511/591337447/-1148394427?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251226_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThjYWJkNGItOTdlMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ARciMvAE03H8aAJUm-p2ikCTtqSXq2Qvx747iGE22XY=)

Here's why this matters: Students and young Arizonans face challenges previous generations never imagined. The economic milestones their parents took for granted — owning a home, affording higher education, building wealth — are now out of reach for many.
U of A College Democrats aren't accepting this as inevitable. They're organizing to hold corporations accountable, protect abortion access and voting rights, fight climate change, and restore the economic opportunities that have been stolen from their generation.
**And they're doing it alongside the Arizona Democratic Party.**
Together, we're building the infrastructure to win in 2026: registering voters across Arizona, defending statewide offices won by razor-thin margins, and competing for congressional seats that could flip the House. We're organizing students, working families, and everyone in between into the coalition Arizona needs.

clean_body: University of Arizona College Democrats are organizing students and fighting for their future. | = Hi there, While Trump and MAGA Republicans attack everything from voting rights to abortion access to basic economic fairness, young Democrats at the University of Arizona are fighting back — and they're not backing down. The University of Arizona College Democrats are building partnerships between students, elected representatives, and local, state, and national Democratic parties to elect Democrats and advance progressive policy. They're organizing on campus, registering first-time voters, and ensuring that student voices are heard in the decisions that shape their futures. = | = Here's why this matters: Students and young Arizonans face challenges previous generations never imagined. The economic milestones their parents took for granted — owning a home, affording higher education, building wealth — are now out of reach for many. U of A College Democrats aren't accepting this as inevitable. They're organizing to hold corporations accountable, protect abortion access and voting rights, fight climate change, and restore the economic opportunities that have been stolen from their generation. And they're doing it alongside the Arizona Democratic Party. Together, we're building the infrastructure to win in 2026: registering voters across Arizona, defending statewide offices won by razor-thin margins, and competing for congressional seats that could flip the House. We're organizing students, working families, and everyone in between into the coalition Arizona needs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the Arizona Democratic Party and the University of Arizona College Democrats will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = We're one year out from elections that will determine Arizona's future. U of A College Democrats are mobilizing students and building the next generation of Democratic leadership. The Arizona Democratic Party is organizing across the state to elect Democrats who will fight for policies that make housing, education, and economic security achievable for young Arizonans. Both organizations need your support to win. Together, we're stronger. Thank you, AZ Dems & UA College Dems Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. GREG FREEMAN, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: How history will remember. . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
No matter what happens...
No matter what happens...
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9136874/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvS2NrUGJ5MkhXNw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjY/LbmNsa05CU3ZFNw/qP2hpZHM9bmNYTUFTcno2ZlhwTVBscw/gaU7ukg/scsf885e042)

| Dear Patriot,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---
No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: **_“Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.”_**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---
**I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump.**
---
_Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my** _own_**._
---
**That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE – with my trial beginning on _January 5_.**
---
_Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit._
---
But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get.
---
_I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America._
---
With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and _WON_!
---
_But, if you can’t give right now (I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, and you likely have a lot on your plate and your mind), then please just carry on with your day._
---
[**But if you can, please make a contribution to my brand new “Rudy Defense Trust” to help me fight for my freedom and justice and beat the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for life.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you, God Bless you, and Merry Christmas!
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Defense Trust

clean_body: No matter what happens... No matter what happens... | Dear Patriot, There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you. No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: “Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.” I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump. Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my own. That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE – with my trial beginning on January 5. Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit. But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get. I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America. With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and WON! But, if you can’t give right now (I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, and you likely have a lot on your plate and your mind), then please just carry on with your day. Thank you, God Bless you, and Merry Christmas! Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

As the year winds down, one thing is clear: next year will be critical for
our courts, our democracy, and our rights. That’s why we need to start
2026 strong — and we can’t do it without you.

At Demand Justice PAC, we’re on the front lines:

📋 Holding anyone bowing to Trump accountable. From lawmakers to
universities to Big Law firms, we make sure anyone backing Trump’s agenda
can’t hide from the record.

⚖️ Exposing extremism in the courts. We make sure the public knows who is
bending our legal system to serve the wealthy and powerful, rather than
all of us.

🏛️ Fighting to reshape the judiciary. We push reforms that make the courts
fair, accountable, and truly representative of the public.

By uncovering corruption, holding power to account, and pushing for
meaningful reform, we generate the pressure needed to block Trump
loyalists, stop tainted judicial nominations, and steer the courts toward
justice and transparency.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20251226.0uUOiD&refcode=em20251226-61025&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61025%2E1407376%2Es0K8uC ]Starting the year strong means starting with you. Chip in today so we
can hit the ground running in 2026 — because the courts won’t wait, and
neither can we.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
