They are discussing a **$12 Trillion "Robotic" Revolution** aimed at bringing manufacturing back to America.

This isn't just talk. It’s part of a broader strategy to revitalize the US economy.

While the mainstream news focuses on the elections, smart players are watching the specific sector that makes this transformation possible.

This "Endgame" strategy could mark the beginning of a historic shift in the market.

[Click here to watch the presentation and see the companies at the center of this revolution.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=63abe1494d894b82873390737a1e0574&_e=FhQFDcAz2Kc-R1Q5kd_3AmiUcd82Eh32kOjlMnM-etszb2-7HoyyRQ_VQbbMyKRwoqx64G4N5ndwQd6TvmtlptGiLGZ2eCQBXZcKiI2rcH1g6YdtQytT28UArNubf9kPmtGV-zhDyFPx6H5_TQ06i9BPjUg6dLh7uKHdSpsEz8DZpwDyCgKMrT24lQlaWH9z18-_FJWL3LvAmHQddd8TpydFyiz7-ems1YzWX7nSTEZ33t5xBRmFQsLP-O1ubJKUNHkvACWLPUzHeM5rBmWH7KrohHjvo9A%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

body:
Peter, I need to level with you.
My team delivered a briefing that shook them..

### From Trump roasts to Epstein protest songs, the satire that defined 2025
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Dec 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75e8e971-3a4c-432b-a33b-621277dc1c5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
In a holiday-themed break from the usual format, **David Shuster** delivers a sharp, irreverent edition of one of our favorite weekly segments here at Blue Amp Media, _Shuster 's Weekly Wrap-Up_! This week, a special one for you!
David counts down his **top five AI-generated satire clips of the year**.
The episode highlights how political humor, music, remix culture, [and other media like film and streaming tv](https://substack.com/redirect/78f1e564-5f30-4968-a360-2f0939db43ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), have become powerful tools for accountability and catharsis in a chaotic news cycle. And in a world where billionaires are buying up media--like CBS News--to do Trump's bidding
The countdown opens with a ferocious AI roast of Donald Trump voiced as Richard Nixon, using brutal historical irony to expose modern corruption. It simply yet smartly makes the point about where we were and where we are, and somehow it's always Republicans doing the crime-ing.
From there, the episode leans into music-driven satire, including Bee Gees-style parody songs and a Taylor Swift-inspired AI performance skewering Trump aboard Air Force One.
* * *
[I'm in! Give me my 40% off!](https://substack.com/redirect/75e8e971-3a4c-432b-a33b-621277dc1c5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
As the list climbs, the tone sharpens. A haunting protest video set in Scotland blends real footage with music to confront Trump's global reputation and unresolved Epstein questions.
In other words, the normal, [everyday reasons that the entire world mocks him, and at home he's lost farmers, ranchers](https://substack.com/redirect/b35ecb6b-4ffc-46a6-94e6-c80105c273b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), bankers, working white men...his base. Perhaps why the dingus is the most unpopular President. Ever.
The top spot goes to a chillingly catchy parody titled _" Epstein Files,"_ which underscores the enduring demand for transparency and justice. No matter how much Pam Bondi, Kash Patel, and Kash Patel's left eye want to make it disappear.
But the public refuses to let the story disappear, which David covers.
More than just comedy, this Weekly Wrap-Up captures how AI satire has evolved into a form of cultural resistance: fast, fearless, and impossible to ignore. Especially when [it takes on the creepiness, cruelty, and weirdness that we call MAGA](https://substack.com/redirect/dbf0c8d9-4a55-47dd-aab5-b7280f84a575?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75e8e971-3a4c-432b-a33b-621277dc1c5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Shuster closes with holiday wishes and a reminder that truth, once exposed, has a way of multiplying--no matter how hard powerful people try to suppress it.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75e8e971-3a4c-432b-a33b-621277dc1c5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Especially when . | | ---|---|--- Shuster closes with holiday wishes and a reminder that truth, once exposed, has a way of multiplying--no matter how hard powerful people try to suppress it. | | ---|---|--- * Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Blue Amp Media, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

We have just a few days left in 2025 to make a serious impact before the crucial 2026 election cycle begins. Thanks to your support, we scored major wins this year: We flipped a **Trump +12** district **BLUE** in the HD 121 special election. We elected not one but TWO Democrats to the Public Service Commission (PSC), marking the first time Democrats have won a statewide constitutional office in nearly **_20 years._** But now, we must **DOUBLE DOWN** on our success. Protecting Senator Jon Ossoff's seat in 2026 is absolutely critical. If Republicans win here, they will lock in their Senate majority and accelerate their damaging MAGA agenda. **We have the momentum, but we need to finish this year strong to carry that energy into 2026, Peter.** [That's why we're aiming to raise $20,000 in our final fundraising push of the year. name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: lowering our ask →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Here’s the truth: Our fundraising has slowed down dramatically in the last month. We don’t mean to alarm you, but as Republicans look for any sign of weakness in Jon Ossoff and this campaign, it’s important that we get back on track — _and quickly_.

**So, that’s why we’re lowering our ask to $2.** _Nope, that’s not a typo. Just $2_.

If you can pitch in a buck (or more!) to Jon’s campaign and Maggie Hassan today to help us get back on track and show the strength of this team _before the final public fundraising deadline of the year,_ you can chip in to this link: [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q42025_jon-ossoff-split_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025719/591341473/32293070?amount=2&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.26_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTQ3ZDY2Yi05ZmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ZMHgDV9va6du8Sx8F8dLFEHut0N_2ZNsc2p0XYBdpU=)

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025732/591341515/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4MjJhNS05ZmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_IlRPSsVtO0Hyv-OhQLUxh7wKqL5gHVQNmZJLvcZaI=&emci=78fba006-8ae2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b9e822a5-9fe2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025733/591341516/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4MjJhNS05ZmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_IlRPSsVtO0Hyv-OhQLUxh7wKqL5gHVQNmZJLvcZaI=) ****
_Happy Holidays From Indiana Democrats!_ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025734/591341517/-2109291273?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4MjJhNS05ZmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_IlRPSsVtO0Hyv-OhQLUxh7wKqL5gHVQNmZJLvcZaI=&emci=78fba006-8ae2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b9e822a5-9fe2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) Hoosiers, we hope you are having a restful and enjoyful holiday season with your loved ones, no matter where you are this year. 2025 has been an incredible year, full of ups and downs. Thanks to all of you, we carried major wins across the finish line, including stopping mid-decade redistricting in its tracks, despite several other states from across the country going down that path. Let's continue working hard in the new year to advance the values of fairness and respect that all Hoosiers deserve. Once again, best wishes for a great holiday season as we head toward the new year. ****_Senator Garten Makes Bizarre Christmas Post Beating Up Santa_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025735/591341518/785356390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4MjJhNS05ZmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_IlRPSsVtO0Hyv-OhQLUxh7wKqL5gHVQNmZJLvcZaI=&emci=78fba006-8ae2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b9e822a5-9fe2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) Republican Senator and Floor Leader Chris Garten made a bizarre Christmas post yesterday, taking time away from his children and family to post an AI-generated set of images beating up Santa Claus outside of the Indiana Statehouse. The set of images have drawn widespread criticism over the last day. Every day, the Republicans at the Statehouse prove they are not serious people, and that they don't deserve to be running our state. This is the latest example of how their leadership is embarrassing Indiana. Hoosiers need a change in 2026 and beyond. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025736/591341519/-1594520854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4MjJhNS05ZmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_IlRPSsVtO0Hyv-OhQLUxh7wKqL5gHVQNmZJLvcZaI=&emci=78fba006-8ae2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b9e822a5-9fe2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) This week, we are highlighting a new effort from the Indiana Democratic Party to hear from Hoosiers across Indiana who are struggling with higher prices on essentials, including groceries, healthcare, and more. We have partnered with the video collection service [Soapboxx](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025737/591341520/-931821799?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4MjJhNS05ZmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_IlRPSsVtO0Hyv-OhQLUxh7wKqL5gHVQNmZJLvcZaI=&emci=78fba006-8ae2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b9e822a5-9fe2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) to collect the stories of Hoosiers on this important issue. [Consider filming a short video over today detailing how your prices have risen in the first year of the Trump and Braun administrations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025738/591341521/-1594520854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWU4MjJhNS05ZmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_IlRPSsVtO0Hyv-OhQLUxh7wKqL5gHVQNmZJLvcZaI=&emci=78fba006-8ae2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b9e822a5-9fe2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) Healthcare costs have skyrocketed on thousands of Hoosier families at the end of 2025, and we want to hear from you on how these cuts are impacting your family. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Happy Holidays From Indiana Democrats! Hoosiers, we hope you are having a restful and enjoyful holiday season with your loved ones, no matter where you are this year. 2025 has been an incredible year, full of ups and downs. Thanks to all of you, we carried major wins across the finish line, including stopping mid-decade redistricting in its tracks, despite several other states from across the country going down that path. Let's continue working hard in the new year to advance the values of fairness and respect that all Hoosiers deserve. Once again, best wishes for a great holiday season as we head toward the new year. Senator Garten Makes Bizarre Christmas Post Beating Up Santa Republican Senator and Floor Leader Chris Garten made a bizarre Christmas post yesterday, taking time away from his children and family to post an AI-generated set of images beating up Santa Claus outside of the Indiana Statehouse. The set of images have drawn widespread criticism over the last day. Every day, the Republicans at the Statehouse prove they are not serious people, and that they don't deserve to be running our state. This is the latest example of how their leadership is embarrassing Indiana. Hoosiers need a change in 2026 and beyond. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, we are highlighting a new effort from the Indiana Democratic Party to hear from Hoosiers across Indiana who are struggling with higher prices on essentials, including groceries, healthcare, and more. We have partnered with the video collection service to collect the stories of Hoosiers on this important issue. Healthcare costs have skyrocketed on thousands of Hoosier families at the end of 2025, and we want to hear from you on how these cuts are impacting your family. Together, we can share how these Republican policies are hurting families, and advocate for a better Indiana. Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, January 8th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. INDems IN the News IndyStar: WTHR: Indiana Capital Chronicle: * Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
Why I went on Andy Cohen’s Bravo show
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025846/591341830/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI5YzRiYi1hMGUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bbEa_oEhPqR_FDxesQLKfYPmDJ8KEa13tZUqIrIgucQ=)
I recently appeared on one of my favorite shows: Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025847/591341831/789508428?refcode=251226_RG_bravo-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI5YzRiYi1hMGUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bbEa_oEhPqR_FDxesQLKfYPmDJ8KEa13tZUqIrIgucQ=)**
I went on that show because millions of people who don’t watch cable news, don’t follow politics on Twitter, and don’t tune into Sunday shows are still paying attention to what’s happening in this country. They’re just paying attention in different places.
If Democrats want to win, protect democracy, and beat MAGA extremism, we cannot limit ourselves to the same audiences and the same spaces we’ve always relied on. We have to show up everywhere — even places that don’t look like traditional “political” venues.
**That’s how we reach new voters. That’s how we break through the noise. And that’s how we make sure the fight for accountability, truth, and working families isn’t drowned out by outrage merchants and conspiracy theorists.**
**[But to continue reaching new audiences and spreading Democrats’ message as we approach the 2026 elections, we need grassroots support to help fund our efforts and continue our important work. That’s where you come in. At this critical moment, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025848/591341832/789508428?refcode=251226_RG_bravo-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI5YzRiYi1hMGUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bbEa_oEhPqR_FDxesQLKfYPmDJ8KEa13tZUqIrIgucQ=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025849/591341833/-309737922?refcode=251226_RG_bravo-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI5YzRiYi1hMGUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bbEa_oEhPqR_FDxesQLKfYPmDJ8KEa13tZUqIrIgucQ=)Republicans are good at occupying every media space they can find — podcasts, cable shows, social platforms — all while pushing an agenda that protects billionaires, attacks health care, and serves an extremist president.
**_We can’t cede those spaces to them._**
I’m in Congress to fight Trump’s corruption, defend democracy, and deliver real results for working families. And I’m willing to do that fight anywhere people are paying attention — not just where it’s comfortable or familiar.
But expanding the battlefield means expanding our resources.
**[If you believe Democrats need to reach new audiences, show up in new spaces, and fight smarter — not just louder — I’m asking you to chip in today. Your support makes it possible to challenge MAGA extremists wherever they try to dominate the conversation and to make sure seriousness, integrity, and truth still break through.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025850/591341834/789508428?refcode=251226_RG_bravo-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI5YzRiYi1hMGUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bbEa_oEhPqR_FDxesQLKfYPmDJ8KEa13tZUqIrIgucQ=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122025851/591341835/-309737922?refcode=251226_RG_bravo-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI5YzRiYi1hMGUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bbEa_oEhPqR_FDxesQLKfYPmDJ8KEa13tZUqIrIgucQ=)

clean_body: Why I went on Andy Cohen’s Bravo show = I recently appeared on one of my favorite shows: Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen. = I went on that show because millions of people who don’t watch cable news, don’t follow politics on Twitter, and don’t tune into Sunday shows are still paying attention to what’s happening in this country. They’re just paying attention in different places. If Democrats want to win, protect democracy, and beat MAGA extremism, we cannot limit ourselves to the same audiences and the same spaces we’ve always relied on. We have to show up everywhere — even places that don’t look like traditional “political” venues. That’s how we reach new voters. That’s how we break through the noise. And that’s how we make sure the fight for accountability, truth, and working families isn’t drowned out by outrage merchants and conspiracy theorists. = are good at occupying every media space they can find — podcasts, cable shows, social platforms — all while pushing an agenda that protects billionaires, attacks health care, and serves an extremist president. We can’t cede those spaces to them. I’m in Congress to fight Trump’s corruption, defend democracy, and deliver real results for working families. And I’m willing to do that fight anywhere people are paying attention — not just where it’s comfortable or familiar. But expanding the battlefield means expanding our resources. = = Thank you, Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

subject: Just four quarters

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1184%2E181023%2EQ89wP2)
Folks,
The anti-public education, anti-abortion DeVos family poured $5 million into a PAC backing the leading Republican, John James, this year. _And more is on the way._
National Republicans will be flooding money into Michigan, hoping to win this toss-up governor’s race and undo _all_ the progress we’ve fought for.
But here’s the thing: Jocelyn Benson isn’t beholden to billionaires or special interests — her campaign is fueled by people like you.
**[That’s why we’re asking: can you pitch in $1 today to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal and harness the power of this grassroots momentum?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/1880?c0=jmb-em-q42025.sGdV8k&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251226_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1184%2E181023%2EQ89wP2)**
[DONATE $1](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/1880?c0=jmb-em-q42025.sGdV8k&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251226_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1184%2E181023%2EQ89wP2)
---
Seriously, just $1.
* $1 to measure up to the DeVos family’s millions.
* $1 to stand up to John James’ anti-education and anti-abortion agenda.
* $1 to protect reproductive freedom, voting rights, and our public schools.
* $1 to win this toss-up seat — and keep Michigan moving forward.
* $1 to show you believe in Jocelyn Benson’s vision for a stronger, safer, more affordable Michigan.

If everyone who opens this email does that much, it won’t just add up — it will show our strength where it matters most. In people power.
**[Every dollar will help us organize, mobilize, and push back against the millions being spent against us. So chip in $1, or more if you can spare it, today.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/1880?c0=jmb-em-q42025.sGdV8k&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251226_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1184%2E181023%2EQ89wP2)**

name: Tobias Read
subject: “Like living in hell”: President Trump says Portland will be next city to see National Guard on streets
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs]
In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251226-portland-pet-rs]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon

While it is understandable that people in the United States were more focused on the recent special elections within the nation, Honduras also had their presidential election on November 30. Even though it is almost 2026, there has still been no declared winner.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6ed4eb35-2069-4e21-be5c-c18d058dc33d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The outcome of the Honduras' election is important for the United States since it appears the right-wing candidate, Nasry Asfura, is ahead of centrist candidate Salvador Nasralla. The current ruling party, which is the left-wing Libre Party, has been involved with delaying election certification through protests due to what they say was fraud, even though the party did not come close to winning.
The recounting of some votes was delayed after multiple days of Libre Party supporters having small riots outside the National Electoral Council.
President Xiomara Castro, of Libre, previously called for mass protests in the capital to "defend the popular mandate, reject any coup attempt, and make visible to the world that a new coup is being hatched here."
[| | | | | Xiomara Castro de Zelaya
---
@XiomaraCastroZ
Al pueblo hondureño: Informo con responsabilidad historica que, a partir de informacion de inteligencia verificada, Juan Orlando Hernandez, perdonado en EEUU, planifica su ingreso al pais para proclamar el ganador de las elecciones al tiempo que esta en marcha una agresion
| 6:50 AM * Dec 16, 2025 * 1.22M Views2.68K Replies * 5.79K Reposts * 12.1K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/6ed4eb35-2069-4e21-be5c-c18d058dc33d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
She has since slightly changed her tune and said she is committed to accepting the outcome of the election. If the National Electoral Council does not declare a winner by December 30, then Honduras' Congress has to certify the election. If their Congress fails to do so, then Castro's term could be extended for up to two years in order to have a new election.
While there are many facets to this situation, the continued uncertainty of who actually won the election is problematic for the Trump administration should Asfura lose. Having a better relationship with the Central American country is critical to facilitate mass deportations from the United States. Should the right-wing candidate win, it signals that Latin America is done with socialist and progressive governments.
This was recently exemplified by Chile electing Jose Antonio Kast, a staunch right-wing candidate who campaigned on carrying out mass deportations and cracking down on crime. Like the United States, Chile has dealt with hundreds of thousands of illegal migrants, mainly from Venezuela, entering the country and dealing with similar problems the United States has had to deal with when it comes to mass migration.
Having Asfura win in Honduras will further isolate not only Venezuelan dictator Nicolas Maduro, but also Colombian President Gustavo Petro and Brazil's Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva -- all hardcore leftists.
The Trump administration is keeping a close eye on the outcome and has already taken steps to pressure Honduras to stop mucking about.
"The Department of State has revoked the visas of Mario Morazan, pursuant to Section 221(i) of the Immigration and Nationality Act (INA), for undermining democracy in Honduras by impeding the vote count. The Department has refused the visa application of Marlon Ochoa and taken steps to impose visa restrictions on another individual for undermining democracy in Honduras," announced State Secretary Marco Rubio.
"The United States will not tolerate actions that undermine our national security and our region's stability. We will consider all appropriate measures to deter those impeding the vote count in Honduras."
* * *
| A guest post by| [Julio Rosas](https://substack.com/@julioarosas?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Field Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. clean_body: The Trump administration is keeping a close eye on the outcome and has already taken steps to pressure Honduras to stop mucking about... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The Trump administration is keeping a close eye on the outcome and has already taken steps to pressure Honduras to stop mucking about... | | | Dec 26| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | While it is understandable that people in the United States were more focused on the recent special elections within the nation, Honduras also had their presidential election on November 30. Even though it is almost 2026, there has still been no declared winner. | | ---|---|--- The outcome of the Honduras' election is important for the United States since it appears the right-wing candidate, Nasry Asfura, is ahead of centrist candidate Salvador Nasralla. The current ruling party, which is the left-wing Libre Party, has been involved with delaying election certification through protests due to what they say was fraud, even though the party did not come close to winning. The recounting of some votes was delayed after multiple days of Libre Party supporters having small riots outside the National Electoral Council. President Xiomara Castro, of Libre, previously called for mass protests in the capital to "defend the popular mandate, reject any coup attempt, and make visible to the world that a new coup is being hatched here." She has since slightly changed her tune and said she is committed to accepting the outcome of the election. If the National Electoral Council does not declare a winner by December 30, then Honduras' Congress has to certify the election. If their Congress fails to do so, then Castro's term could be extended for up to two years in order to have a new election. While there are many facets to this situation, the continued uncertainty of who actually won the election is problematic for the Trump administration should Asfura lose. Having a better relationship with the Central American country is critical to facilitate mass deportations from the United States. Should the right-wing candidate win, it signals that Latin America is done with socialist and progressive governments. This was recently exemplified by Chile electing Jose Antonio Kast, a staunch right-wing candidate who campaigned on carrying out mass deportations and cracking down on crime. Like the United States, Chile has dealt with hundreds of thousands of illegal migrants, mainly from Venezuela, entering the country and dealing with similar problems the United States has had to deal with when it comes to mass migration. Having Asfura win in Honduras will further isolate not only Venezuelan dictator Nicolas Maduro, but also Colombian President Gustavo Petro and Brazil's Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva -- all hardcore leftists. The Trump administration is keeping a close eye on the outcome and has already taken steps to pressure Honduras to stop mucking about. "The Department of State has revoked the visas of Mario Morazan, pursuant to Section 221(i) of the Immigration and Nationality Act (INA), for undermining democracy in Honduras by impeding the vote count. The Department has refused the visa application of Marlon Ochoa and taken steps to impose visa restrictions on another individual for undermining democracy in Honduras," announced State Secretary Marco Rubio. "The United States will not tolerate actions that undermine our national security and our region's stability. We will consider all appropriate measures to deter those impeding the vote count in Honduras." * | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. Subscribe to my newsletter for original content as I travel the United States and beyond. You're currently a free subscriber to . clean_body: Your invitation from Trump might rot soon. Accept asap! | | | | EXCLUSIVE OFFER FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP Dear Peter, President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club. You’re not asleep! But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one. I personally created the 47th President Founders Club for one reason only: To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice. I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself. Your name rose straight to the top. ** That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of my 47th President Founders Club. Only 4,700 spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you! ** Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history. Your name could be one of them. I am counting on you. Recently, I got to hang out with my favorite pediatrician and candidate for Senate, Annie Andrews. We talked about all she’s doing in South Carolina to put spineless Lindsey Graham’s feet to the fire to finally kick him to the curb next year, and how she OUTRAISED him this past quarter, showing the momentum her campaign has. And frankly, Peter, it’s momentum I know we all witnessed at the No Kings Rallies across the country. **The No Kings initiative is important because we have to stand up for our rights, for our democracy, and against authoritarianism.** **[**_If you agree, I’m hoping I can count on your support to split a donation between Raja Krishnamoorthi and Annie’s campaign right now. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122026885/591345291/-724483291?amount=25&amounts=250,100,50,25,10,5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.26_Annie-Split-Conway-NK_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTMyNmQ4Yi1hNmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T_aDeL8uBDz5uvsiNjF_I_XiRiYileJWABTRZrq67Bo=)** | | [ DONATE NOW → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122026886/591345292/-724483291?amount=25&amounts=250,100,50,25,10,5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.26_Annie-Split-Conway-NK_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTMyNmQ4Yi1hNmUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T_aDeL8uBDz5uvsiNjF_I_XiRiYileJWABTRZrq67Bo=)

Annie had someone tell her this was a “hate America rally.” That kind of language truly pisses me off — because it couldn’t be further from the truth.
These are people who love this country. We love America, and this country stands for things that Donald Trump wants to take away from us: the right to free speech, the right to vote, **and the right to basically have a government that's not run by a bunch of corrupt morons.**
That’s why we came together, and that’s why we have to elect Annie to the Senate. She’s running against one of those corrupt morons, and I’m more than ready to see his reign end.
But Annie can’t do this alone, she needs all of us to have her back.

clean_body: These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can . = Peter, it’s George Conway. Recently, I got to hang out with my favorite pediatrician and candidate for Senate, Annie Andrews. We talked about all she’s doing in South Carolina to put spineless Lindsey Graham’s feet to the fire to finally kick him to the curb next year, and how she OUTRAISED him this past quarter, showing the momentum her campaign has. And frankly, Peter, it’s momentum I know we all witnessed at the No Kings Rallies across the country. The No Kings initiative is important because we have to stand up for our rights, for our democracy, and against authoritarianism. = | | = Annie had someone tell her this was a “hate America rally.” That kind of language truly pisses me off — because it couldn’t be further from the truth. These are people who love this country. We love America, and this country stands for things that Donald Trump wants to take away from us: the right to free speech, the right to vote, and the right to basically have a government that's not run by a bunch of corrupt morons. That’s why we came together, and that’s why we have to elect Annie to the Senate. She’s running against one of those corrupt morons, and I’m more than ready to see his reign end. But Annie can’t do this alone, she needs all of us to have her back. = | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s get this done,Let’s get this done. George Conway | These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, click here. If you'd prefer, you can . name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240557%2E444211%2E4pyv_l)
As this year comes to a close, I want to take a moment to say thank you because everything Powered by People has done this year happened because _this team showed up and did the work._
**You showed up to register voters. You showed up to recruit candidates for every position on the ballot. You showed up to events and town halls across the state. You showed up in communities that too often get written off or taken for granted.**
Because of you, we’ve grown our organizing across the state, trained volunteers, registered voters, recruited candidates, and done the work that’s already making a difference. We’re not waiting until the last few months before an election. We’re doing the work now—and it’s paying off. Which brings me to 2026 and the next 10 months until early voting begins:
We have real opportunities to change the makeup of Texas statewide. Races that used to be considered “impossible” are now competitive because people are hungry for leaders who actually understand their lives and fight for them.
Take Senate District 9 in Texas as an example. Democrat Taylor Rehmet just forced a runoff in a district Donald Trump won by more than _17 points_ last year. Taylor grew up in this district. He lives there. He knows what working families are up against because he’s lived it himself. And last month, he finished first—ahead of two Republicans with 48% of the vote.
That didn’t happen by accident. It happened because voters are ready for leaders who fight for them—and because organizers and volunteers refused to give up on a place they were told couldn’t change.
But if we’re going to keep building on this momentum, have the backs of candidates like Taylor, and start 2026 with momentum on our side, we have to finish this year strong.
[**Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is on Wednesday, and I’m asking you to pitch in before then. Every dollar helps us organize earlier, reach more Texans, register more voters, and win races that will shape the future of this state.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251226.dSsAj5&refcode=ema20251226-240557&t=3&akid=240557%2E444211%2E4pyv_l)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251226.dSsAj5&refcode=ema20251226-240557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240557%2E444211%2E4pyv_l)**
Thank you,
Beto

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20251226-240557-footer&t=23&refcode2=240557_444211_4pyv_l&akid=240557%2E444211%2E4pyv_l)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/update-contact-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/)

subject: Emerge women hold the line.

body:
Emerge is where I learned everything about running for office. How to fundraise. How to build a real organizing base. How to turn your community into your power. And it’s where I met the people who still keep me grounded and sane.

| Peter,

It’s Congresswoman Yassamin Ansari from Phoenix, Arizona. I’m an Emerge alum, and the youngest woman in Congress.

Emerge is where I learned everything about running for office. How to fundraise. How to build a real organizing base. How to turn your community into your power. And it’s where I met the people who still keep me grounded and sane.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122027218/591346309/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-12-26_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExNGViNmRhLWFiZTItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UmmHCC96dWQiGCnbYVs4g4VBd-WfzZpuL4lHGWr8v0w=)
---
Now, I serve in Congress and represent one of the most diverse districts in the country — with 64 languages spoken, refugees, immigrant families, people just trying to survive Donald Trump’s cruelty — and every day I’m reminded how much it matters who sits in these seats.

That’s why Emerge matters. They don’t just train candidates, they train candidates _who get it._ Women who can campaign, govern, organize, clap back, and hold the line.

And they have the receipts: in 2025, Emerge women won at 77%, and first-time candidates were six times more likely to win.

**A new generation of leadership doesn’t just appear out of nowhere. It comes from places like Emerge, and from people willing to invest in it.**

[_**But right now, Emerge is still short of their year-end goal. If they can’t close the gap, they’ll have to scale back their trainings for women who are ready to flip seats and defend our rights. So if you can, please donate before December 31 to help Emerge finish strong.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122027219/591346310/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-12-26_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExNGViNmRhLWFiZTItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UmmHCC96dWQiGCnbYVs4g4VBd-WfzZpuL4lHGWr8v0w=)

And it’s where I met the people who still keep me grounded and sane. | = | Peter, It’s Congresswoman Yassamin Ansari from Phoenix, Arizona. I’m an Emerge alum, and the youngest woman in Congress. Emerge is where I learned everything about running for office. How to fundraise. How to build a real organizing base. How to turn your community into your power. And it’s where I met the people who still keep me grounded and sane. | = Now, I serve in Congress and represent one of the most diverse districts in the country — with 64 languages spoken, refugees, immigrant families, people just trying to survive Donald Trump’s cruelty — and every day I’m reminded how much it matters who sits in these seats. That’s why Emerge matters. They don’t just train candidates, they train candidates who get it. Women who can campaign, govern, organize, clap back, and hold the line. And they have the receipts: in 2025, Emerge women won at 77%, and first-time candidates were six times more likely to win. A new generation of leadership doesn’t just appear out of nowhere. It comes from places like Emerge, and from people willing to invest in it. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for supporting women who will bring common sense back to Congress. We really need it. —Rep. name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is where I stand:
body:
A few of the differences between Michael Whatley and me:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)
Peter — I ask you for a lot. For your attention. For your donation. For you to put your trust in me. _In return, you deserve to know exactly where I stand._ ♀️ Abortion is health care
🩺 Health care must be affordable and accessible
🌎 Climate change is real and an existential threat
💰 Cutting taxes for the richest by slashing health care for millions is just wrong
🗳️ Extreme Republicans are undermining the right to vote to protect their own power **[We’re days away from this campaign’s most important fundraising deadline yet, and Peter, I need your help. I’m ready to fight for the values I know we share. Are you ready to invest in this campaign so I can get to Washington and get to work? Please pitch in anything you can to help us hit our end-of-quarter filing goal.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3255?t=7&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)** Look, I’m running to fight for the people of this state and families across the country. My opponent said himself that he’s running for one person: _President Trump._ _He even said Trump’s team is running his campaign._ Whatley will be a party line vote for the far-right on issues that affect us every day — he’s already called the GOP bill slashing Medicaid a “huge win.” **Michael Whatley stands for the Republican Party. I stand for you.** Whatley and his allies have super PACs and mega-donors lined up, ready to spend any amount of money trying to defeat me. We can’t let them buy this seat — the seat that will determine whether or not we can take back the U.S. Senate for the American people. **[I’m asking you to pitch in now because our numbers will go public after the year ends, and falling short could give my opponent and his allies an opening to surge ahead. Donate whatever you can before our deadline on Wednesday.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3255?t=8&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)** I appreciate all you do, Roy Cooper [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3255?t=9&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=10&akid=218%2E124072%2EqFhMPk)

body:
There are only five days left to reach our $100,000 goal.
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251226-351&t=1&akid=351%2E34582%2Eyaqj7J)
We only have five days left to reach our $100,000 end-of-year fundraising goal before 2025 ends, Peter.
With Donald Trump already backing his fellow grifter and MAGA extremist Mike Lindell in this race for governor, we can’t afford to come up short — especially since our fundraising numbers will be publicly filed for everyone to see!
Our finance team did the math. Based on our average contribution of $29.23 and the number of Tim Walz supporters in your area, we need just 10 more folks from your community to donate, and we should smash our goal in no time!
**[Peter, will you be one of the 10 Tim Walz supporters in your area we need to step up with a donation today?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_202526_2.2bSRK_&amount=5&refcode=em20251226-351&t=2&akid=351%2E34582%2Eyaqj7J)**

This race is shaping up to be one of the most expensive gubernatorial elections in Minnesota’s history, and we know Trump and Lindell will dig deep into their war chests, personal fortunes, and network of billionaire donors to try to unseat Tim.
Anything you can pitch in today will go a long way in making sure we’re prepared to fight back and WIN!
— Team Walz

The major outlets agree: **we have no room for error heading into 2026.** The wind is at our back and momentum is on our side, but we have to fight every single day if we’re going to win the Senate majority that working families deserve. name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: A short but important request — please, read this today
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMzNDQyNDAS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM2MDI4NTU1MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
https://links.messages.lcv. We’re running out of time, Peter. Hundreds of people from around the country have stepped up today for Giving Tuesday, but we’re still running short of the 1,000 members we need to unlock an additional $100,000 for our work before midnight tonight. And with the Trump administration accelerating some of the most extreme anti-environment, pro-polluter attacks in modern history,falling short is simply not an option. We’re asking you, Peter: will you renew your LCV membership right now while membership is only $5 to help us unlock an additional $100,000 to oppose the Trump administration’s attempts to exploit our public lands and roll back climate progress? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_RcAb2-- This isn’t just about hitting a number. It’s about having the resources we need to challenge these increasingly reckless orders and attempts to shred environmental safeguards — and stop the polluter handouts that Trump and his allies are fast-tracking. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. Every single person who steps up today is critical to our efforts — here’s why this Giving Tuesday is so important: Trump is trying to erase the scientific and legal foundation of climate action. By dismantling the Endangerment Finding, which affirms that greenhouse gas emissions harm our health and welfare, Trump’s EPA would hand fossil fuel companies a free pass to spew climate pollution into our air. He’s also ending the program that required big polluters to report their pollution, making it nearly impossible to track what they’re spewing or hold them accountable.
Decades of established pollution protections are being peeled away. More than a dozen rules that keep toxic pollution out of the air we breathe and water we drink to protect our health are on the chopping block, tossed aside to allow fossil fueled power plants to cut corners and shift the burden of their damage onto our communities.
The Trump administration is giving away the Arctic to corporate polluters, working to allow more drilling in one of the planet’s last intact ecosystems. Mining roads carved through national parks and preserves. Fire-sale auctions in critical ecosystems. Hundreds of millions of acres of U.S. waters off Alaska potentially opened to drilling. It could do irreparable damage to wildlife, our climate, and Alaska Native communities. We’re working every day with our 30 state affiliates, organizing on the ground, exposing backroom deals and corruption, rallying voters, and defending the treasured and unique places that define our country. But meeting this moment requires resources — especially as we go up against big polluters and fossil fuel opponents. This $100,000 match challenge, and how many people step up this Giving Tuesday, will determine how hard we can push back. Peter, your renewal right now powers our work to protect people and the planet. Will you renew before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help keep this movement strong when it matters most? $5 is all it takes. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrM80DbbJ~ Every contribution brings us closer. And the clock is ticking. Thanks for standing with us, Chris Brooks

Team Abdul

name: April Christenson
subject: Re: Give now: What can we do without a living planet?
body:
Hi Peter,
Have you read Eve’s story yet? Now is a time of generosity and giving, and I hope you’ll consider joining Eve by making a generous gift of $50 to OLCV today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Your donation will have a tremendous impact in passing lasting climate action in the 2026 session and electing pro-climate candidates in this big upcoming election.
Make a gift [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=PwPU6ZU8YVZUIDVd3uUFP72e8MZaNMMsDnfHqm5fOmqEbcnKhi5mMv9FCQChgHfFITZp33YFUXBIi8sKhs2su2cj/1tS536JwmJ2asLYkC2ZfSaV8ORbYv7rtWJwrpNX]
We are nothing without a liveable planet, and that’s why donors like Eve give to OLCV! We’re here to get the job done for a sustainable future. Please consider making a gift now so we have what it takes for the new year! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/April%27s%20Signature.png]
April Christenson (she/her)
OLCV Development Director
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=PwPU6ZU8YVZUIDVd3uUFP72e8MZaNMMsDnfHqm5fOmqEbcnKhi5mMv9FCQChgHfFITZp33YFUXBIi8sKhs2su2cj/1tS536JwmJ2asLYkC2ZfSaV8ORbYv7rtWJwrpNX [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=PwPU6ZU8YVZUIDVd3uUFP72e8MZaNMMsDnfHqm5fOmqEbcnKhi5mMv9FCQChgHfFITZp33YFUXBIi8sKhs2su2cj/1tS536JwmJ2asLYkC2ZfSaV8ORbYv7rtWJwrpNX]
Dear Peter,
I’ve been on staff at OLCV for a decade now. During my time here I’ve built strong relationships with our donors, and I can confidently say that our OLCV members are the most passionate and committed allies. By providing our organization with reliable funding, OLCV members are the foundation for all that we do to protect Oregon’s flowing rivers, fresh forest air, glorious mountains, and all of the wildlife and people that call this beloved place home.
You too can make all the difference by making a generous end-of-year gift now, ensuring that we have the resources to continue strong into 2026. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Make a gift [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=PwPU6ZU8YVZUIDVd3uUFP72e8MZaNMMsDnfHqm5fOmqEbcnKhi5mMv9FCQChgHfFITZp33YFUXBIi8sKhs2su2cj/1tS536JwmJ2asLYkC2ZfSaV8ORbYv7rtWJwrpNX]
I know that there is much on your mind this past year. But as our donors know, nothing else matters without a living planet. OLCV is here to help voters identify the candidates who are most likely to take us into a liveable future, and to hold those accountable who aren’t.
Eve Heidtmann from Portland, has been a member of OLCV for over 45 years. While in conversation with Eve about her membership, she told me:
What could be more important than the future of life on Earth? Decisions made by elected officials determine what will be left for all children and all species. OLCV helps us find and support the candidates who are most committed to saving habitats, climate, air and water.
Eve chooses to give to OLCV year after year because of the impactful personal connections she’s made to our staff and members, and for the accessible and straight information that OLCV provides voters with. Donors like Eve are what keeps OLCV alive.
Make a gift [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=PwPU6ZU8YVZUIDVd3uUFP72e8MZaNMMsDnfHqm5fOmqEbcnKhi5mMv9FCQChgHfFITZp33YFUXBIi8sKhs2su2cj/1tS536JwmJ2asLYkC2ZfSaV8ORbYv7rtWJwrpNX]
If you too love Oregon and our planet, please consider making a generous gift to OLCV now, so that we can keep fighting to ensure a liveable future for all. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/April%27s%20Signature.png]
April Christenson (she/her)
OLCV Development Director
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!

body:

| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17209086/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvS2dqeGR5UHBTSw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjY/LbmNsWWxxU21Zdg/qP2hpZHM9bmNMRVlJWDBndWw2cHlscw/gaU8gUQ/s0k173bbffe)

| | Patriot,
---
2026 is the firewall.
If we lose the House or fail to take back the Senate, the left finishes the job they started.
That’s why Turning Point PAC is deploying the most sophisticated ballot-chasing operation the conservative movement has ever built — bigger and more advanced than anything we've done before.
**In Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Michigan we are:**

* **Identifying** every single low-propensity America First voter

* **Registering** unregistered Patriots

* **Chasing** every legal ballot with thousands of paid chasers using our first-of-its-kind mobile app

* **Curing** ballots and building authentic relationships door by door, call by call, text by text

* **Constructing** a permanent Red Wall that no Democrat can breach in 2026, 2028, or beyond

The left had a decade head start and billions from their billionaire donors. We're not just catching up — _we're surpassing them in the states that decide everything, right now._
**[Whether it’s $1 or $100 — every dollar you give today fuels paid ballot chasers in the field, banking the votes that secure Senate seats, House majorities, and the America First agenda.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17209086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0zX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIyMS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjY/LbmNsWWxxU21Zdg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNTdfd3Iz/gaU8gUQ/s2id751213d)**
Help us build the unbreakable machine and chart a path to victory.
[SUPPORT TURNING POINT PAC TODAY!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17209086/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0zX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIyMS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjY/LbmNsWWxxU21Zdg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNTdfd3Iz/gaU8gUQ/s2id751213d)
Yours in Freedom,
Turning Point PAC Team
|

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Sorry to bug you on a Friday evening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
This sets the tone for everything we do between now and Election Day next April.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251226-947&t=1&akid=947%2E294397%2EQYpJcH)
Hey,
We know it’s late on a Friday, but this is important.
We have a major public fundraising deadline coming up on December 31.
What we raise before then sets the tone for everything we do between now and Election Day next April.
This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters — folks chipping in whatever they can to help elect a fair, impartial, and principled judge to the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
[**If you can spare $10 today, it’ll make a real difference. Every bit helps. Truly.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251226_2_ak.XJGJ93&amount=10&refcode=em20251226-947&t=3&akid=947%2E294397%2EQYpJcH) 🙏
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251226_2_ak.XJGJ93&amount=10&refcode=em20251226-947&t=22&akid=947%2E294397%2EQYpJcH)**
Thanks for powering this movement,
Team Taylor

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251226-947&t=23&refcode2=947_294397_QYpJcH&akid=947%2E294397%2EQYpJcH)**
